title: Jack’s Handprint
excerpt: Jack "graduated" from mommy & me class! It was such a special year getting to know a dozen moms and their babies (all born in September/October 2013). For graduation, our teacher did hand prints of all the kids. Then mommies…
body: Jack "graduated" from mommy & me class! It was such a special year getting to know a dozen moms and their babies (all born in September/October 2013). For graduation, our teacher did hand prints of all the kids. Then mommies got a marker and we passed the pages around and wrote something on each child's print. Such a great idea, and now the work of art is hanging in Jack's playroom. I cherish it and smile each time I look at the words describing my little guy.
